title: Fancy Dust
description: 3D clean redstone dust with beautiful power level indicators
body:
This resource pack should work for Minecraft versions **1.15 and above**.\
It is an edit of the resource pack [Edged Redstone](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/edged-redstone/) made by Azalea_Korita.\
If you want to publish a project containing my work, please mention my username "Vunyx" somewhere. Also, a link to my project would be much appreciated.

# Description
This resource pack makes redstone dust **3D**, and adds a beautiful **power level indicator**.
Redstone dust is the only affected block, so I recommend **using it alongside my other resource packs** like [Clean Redstone - main components](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clean-redstone-main-components) (put Fancy Dust on top of the resource pack list).
The font of the indicators is what you typically find in a vanilla-like 32x resource pack.

This is what it looks like:
![redstone line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3b9269298dff0bfce7c3b4736aeb5340fb0f585.png)

If you want to make the indicators use **hexadecimal** instead, or **remove the indicators** entirely, you can do so by unzipping the file, and going to `Fancy Dust\assets\minecraft\blockstates`. Here you will find alternate versions of `redstone_wire.json`. Remove the original one and rename the version you want to `redstone_wire.json`.

# How to install
After downloading the resource pack, go to **options -> resource packs** and click the **Open Pack Folder** button, or open `%appdata%\.minecraft\resourcepacks` directly. Put the resource pack in this folder. It should then show up under **Available**. Click the arrow to switch it to the **Selected** tab and click **Done**. That's it, the pack should now be installed properly.
